[2019-09-04 21:55] velizar_ (Name): eX902-KBleN
How did I lose this? And more importantly, was that Lucina line actually good? It wastes 2 red 2 energy and floats 6 gold, and yet I felt behind right after it. My two first red  units should've been tarsiers, but I don't think that would've been enough?
[2019-09-04 22:00] amalloy: i don't see much here to justify a third engi, while lucina has a ton of support
[2019-09-04 22:01] amalloy: maybe doomed mech into grid could be playable, but you didn't do that
[2019-09-04 22:01] siepu: with lucina in the set you either rush lucina or make sure to have enough pressure to make it hard for the opponent to lucina
[2019-09-04 22:01] siepu: you didnt do neither so after lucina I was just reading and doing whatever as I couldnt really lose
[2019-09-04 22:02] amalloy: well, that's not true. a more patient lucina is totally fine if there's some good defense. you want her to be one of your first attackers, but you don't have to get her asap
[2019-09-04 22:02] siepu: sure agreed here too
[2019-09-04 22:03] amalloy: but i agree this game was over on turn 4. i'm not sure if AA is winning right away, but responding with DDBA is definitely losing, since it cuts you off from the units you went EEE for
[2019-09-04 22:03] velizar_ (Name): yeah I thought lucina was going to be easier to punish.
[2019-09-04 22:04] amalloy: she's sneaky like that. a one-spider army, with those perfs to defend
[2019-09-04 22:04] siepu: the only turn its easy to punish is the turn its bought
[2019-09-04 22:04] siepu: remember she brings 2 free soak every turn
[2019-09-04 22:05] velizar_ (Name): damn. I guess the cost-effectiveness of lucina is much higher than I thought.
[2019-09-04 22:06] siepu: even if you ignore the click its 4 attack for 17 gold
[2019-09-04 22:06] siepu: better than tarsiers
[2019-09-04 22:06] siepu: and click ability is super fucking strong
[2019-09-04 22:06] siepu: shes not as op as centurion but she definitely warps the set
[2019-09-04 22:08] velizar_ (Name): well, good job for owning me
[2019-09-04 22:08] siepu: np you owned yourself
[2019-09-04 22:08] siepu: and you even learned something so youre a true winner
[2019-09-04 22:09] velizar_ (Name): I don't feel bad if I lost because I mis-estimated the cost-effectiveness of a unit because I don't think there's a lookup table/Wiki for it, so the only way to learn it is by grinding games? I guess
[2019-09-04 22:10] siepu: tarsies is 1 attack in 2 turns
[2019-09-04 22:10] siepu: 4 tarsiers is 4 attack in 2 turns
[2019-09-04 22:10] siepu: lucina costs 1 more but attacks immidiately
[2019-09-04 22:10] velizar_ (Name): so it's +8 gold for the effectiveness over tarsiers, but there's the click ability
[2019-09-04 22:10] siepu: and tarsiers are quite efficient
[2019-09-04 22:10] velizar_ (Name): the click ability is also really good for being a red sink, so that's really hard to math
[2019-09-04 22:10] amalloy: big units tend to be more efficient than small units, because it's harder to get them
[2019-09-04 22:11] amalloy: if you can find a plausible excuse to get one, it's probably not an awful idea
[2019-09-04 22:11] velizar_ (Name): (I mean the entire click ability is hard to math)
[2019-09-04 22:11] amalloy: perf+botch+ossi is a lot of help for lucina
[2019-09-04 22:11] siepu: on pure attack scale lucina is close to cymestra
[2019-09-04 22:11] siepu: a super good attacker
[2019-09-04 22:11] siepu: and you again get the great click for almost free
[2019-09-04 22:12] siepu: and she doesnt even have the issue of other big tech units like odin or defence grid
[2019-09-04 22:12] siepu: as she spends the tech by herself
[2019-09-04 22:13] velizar_ (Name): the problem is that I don't know whether this means that I'd be willing to float 5 gold for a turn to get her a turn earlier, or 10 gold, or 15 gold
[2019-09-04 22:14] siepu: p2 has a natural t5 lucina afaik (would need to do the math)
[2019-09-04 22:14] siepu: you dont have to throw everything you dont HAVE to rush her asap
[2019-09-04 22:14] siepu: just if you dont always do the math when the enemy can buy her
[2019-09-04 22:15] siepu: so you can pressure enough for them to be hard to buy her
[2019-09-04 22:15] velizar_ (Name): I mean I thought that wasting 2 red and floating a bunch of gold to get her is already game-losing, because I didn't know the exact numbers, or the approximate numbers either
[2019-09-04 22:16] siepu: 2 red is 2 gold kinda whatever I would grab some units instead if you did something on your turn
[2019-09-04 22:16] siepu: but  you  went 3rd engi and bought drones
[2019-09-04 22:17] siepu: like, would you  go 3rd engi against ampo?
[2019-09-04 22:17] siepu: lucy is kinda simmiliar
[2019-09-04 22:17] velizar_ (Name): yeah I'm just trying to generalize this to other units whose cost-effectiveness I don't know
[2019-09-04 22:18] velizar_ (Name): I'm trying to come up with a way of approximating the cost-effectiveness, instead of having to grind games until I learn it

[2019-09-05 20:35] stacko: To be fair, good red soak is also often a good red sink
[2019-09-05 20:39] shadourow (Rando): Can you develop please @mrguy888 ?
I feel like vai with centurion in play is a 
13+6 BRR (+ inflation) unit with 3+3-1 :Attack: + 6 instant damage (Centurion is perma chilled)

~ 21BRR 5 attack + 6 instant damage unit feel awesome to me, or am I wrong somewhere ?
[2019-09-05 20:40] shadourow (Rando): (Basically : what I mean is that buying Centurion enable a super efficient Vai for the opponent)
[2019-09-05 20:42] 307th: a vai that freezes centurion is amazing
[2019-09-05 20:43] 307th: although how amazing depends on what their backup absorber is (e.g. if there's also Energy Matrix in the set, it will just be doing 3 dmg per turn, while if the next biggest absorber is Wall, it'll be doing 5 damage per turn like you said)
[2019-09-05 20:44] 307th: the idea mrguy is saying is that centurion is strong enough that even when your opponent can buy an amazing vai to freeze it, centurion is still worth getting
[2019-09-05 20:46] 307th: IMO if vai's around, centurion is a decent purchase but not so strong that it's worth going out of your way for
[2019-09-05 20:47] shadourow (Rando): I understand his statement, but I don't understand why it is true :
Is a 18BBRGG 2 attackers that forces op to get an usually ok unit really worth it ?
[2019-09-05 20:47] 307th: it also provides soak and one health per turn
[2019-09-05 20:47] shadourow (Rando): wait, no, not one health
[2019-09-05 20:48] shadourow (Rando): I supposed that unless a player get Cent, his opp won't buy a second annimus for Vai
[2019-09-05 20:48] jamberine: Having cent gives you 2 attack, an absorb, and 3 defense tempo (they aren't threatening wall freeze)
[2019-09-05 20:48] shadourow (Rando): (I, obviously, may be wrong)
[2019-09-05 20:48] 307th: it forces opponent to click vai each turn to freeze it, meaning they lose 1 dmg
[2019-09-05 20:48] shadourow (Rando): Yeah, But I feel like without Cent being bought, Vai wouldn't be bought too
[2019-09-05 20:48] jamberine: And forces them to buy vai
[2019-09-05 20:49] shadourow (Rando): Therefore, this argument isn't true
[2019-09-05 20:49] shadourow (Rando): You make your opp buy a 5 :Attack: Vai, you don't save 1 attack per turn (exept first turn, where you get + 3 absorb)
[2019-09-05 20:50] 307th: you're counting vai's absorb denial twice
[2019-09-05 20:50] 307th: if they already have vai up and you buy a centurion, you keep absorbing on wall, but they're doing 1 less damage per turn (since they're clicking vai)
[2019-09-05 20:51] 307th: and if they buy vai up as a response to cent and you get a turn of 5 absorb, that only makes centurion better
[2019-09-05 20:51] siepu: vai doesnt make cent useless, just worse
[2019-09-05 20:52] siepu: and yes depending on the set and how the game goes cent still does things against vai
[2019-09-05 20:54] mrguy888: total threat is 8 so 5+6 is inaccurate
[2019-09-05 21:02] shadourow (Rando): I disagree,
Total threat is 2 dmg + 6 freeze, indeed
But you actually deal 5 damage (2 + 3 absorb denial) while denying your opponent 6 shield.

Mmmh... Let's see an example :
Vilain has Vai + 3 atk, and Heros had Centurion + Wall + 3 engies.

Heros had to set up a total of 12 🛡  to defend  against Vilain and will take 3 dmgs.

With Centurion has greatest absorber, Heros has a maximum of 5 absorb, so here, was virtually attacked by 8 (8-5 = 3)
And... 12-8-1 = 3 not 6, indeed. (-1 for the extra defence always needed in order to absorb)

So I must reconsider something

In that situation, I think it's correct to consider Vai as a virtually **5 :Attack: + 3 instant damage attacker** (so 3 less instant attack than my previous statement)
[2019-09-05 21:03] mrguy888: but you also assume wall absorb which is often not true
[2019-09-05 21:04] shadourow (Rando): If better than wall absorb, Centurion is obviously even better
[2019-09-05 21:04] mrguy888: better is 3+(5-(secondary absorber))+(6-(secondary absorber)) threat
[2019-09-05 21:05] mrguy888: if you wanna do math do it right
[2019-09-05 21:06] shadourow (Rando): Oh damn, this guy got me so damn hard by giving me the answers I was asking for !
I guess that I stop there, in that case
[2019-09-05 21:07] mrguy888: you didnt ask for the answer you confidently gave the wrong answer
[2019-09-05 21:07] mrguy888: there is a pretty big difference there
[2019-09-05 21:08] mrguy888: You also have to consider when people have to commit to things
[2019-09-05 21:08] mrguy888: if opponent commits to vai before you buy cent, you can just kill them
[2019-09-05 21:09] mrguy888: so the cent comes down first to amazing effect
[2019-09-05 21:09] mrguy888: and opponent is likely not in a spot to efficiently commit to vai because that puts them in a losing spot
[2019-09-05 21:11] 307th: to be fair, confidently giving the wrong answer is the best way to get people to explain the right answer
[2019-09-05 21:13] mrguy888: yes, people going around confident about things that are wrong about is not the biggest problem society faces in general.
[2019-09-05 21:13] mrguy888: its totally okay and should continue
[2019-09-05 21:14] wilson0862 (Wilson): I mean... he just came in here to flesh out his understanding and said he obviously may be wrong. This is a very weird critique.
[2019-09-05 21:17] mrguy888: well, he started that post saying "i disagree" then after diagreeing he counted to the very high number of 8 on his own for clearly the first time in this situation
[2019-09-05 21:17] mrguy888: after counting to 8 he realized he was wrong on his own
